version_description: This is the extended version of the song. There are more added lyrics in this version, hence the refrain. Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YIvwCIwDQT8.

versions.version_description: Added a Csus2 chord as I can hear in the song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]

[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]

[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Tell me all the ways you need me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Catch me or I go Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
  Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
Everybody knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Catch me or I go Houdini[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]N.C.     [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Csus2[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
    Time is passin' like a solar eclipse[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
   See you watchin' and you blow me a kiss[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Csus2[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
   It's your moment, baby, don't let it slip[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]             N.C.
   Come in closer, are you readin' my lips?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
They say I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Tell me all the ways you need me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Catch me or I go Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
 Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
Everybody knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Catch me or I go Houdini[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]Csus2[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
  If you're good enough, you'll find the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]Csus2[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
  Maybe you could cause a girl to change her ways[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Csus2[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Do you think about it night and day?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Csus2[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
   Maybe you could be the one to make me stay[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]   [ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]Csus2[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Everything you say is soundin' so sweet[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]Csus2[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
   But do you practice everythin' that you preach?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]Csus2[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
   I need something that'll make me believe[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]Csus2[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
   If you got it, baby, give it to me[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]Csus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Weave the ceilin' from tomorrow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]Csus2[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Free the people from daylight[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]Csus2[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
All the plans go out the window[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]Csus2[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
When we're out this late at night[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
They say I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Tell me all the ways you need me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Catch me or I go Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
 Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
Everybody knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Catch me or I go Houdini[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]Csus2[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
  If you're good enough, you'll find the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]Csus2[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
  Maybe you could cause a girl to change her ways[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Csus2[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Do you think about it night and day?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Csus2[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
   Maybe you could be the one to make me stay[/tab]


[Breakdown]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
  (Oh-oh, ohh...oooooooo)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
             (Maybe you could be the one to make me stay)[/tab]
[ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
 (Time is passin' like a solar eclipse)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 (See you watchin' and you blow me a kiss)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
   (Baby, don't let it slip)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
(Come in closer, are you readin' my lips?)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
(They say)         (Oh-oh, ohh...oooooooo)[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]
(I come and I go)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]
(Tell me all the ways you need me)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
(I'm not here for long)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
(Catch me or I go Houdini)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]
(I come and I go (I come and I go)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]
(Prove you got the right to please me)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
(Everybody knows (I'm not here for long)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
(Catch me or I go Houdini)[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Weave the ceilin' from tomorrow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Free the people from daylight[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
All the plans go out the window[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
When we're out this late at night[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
They say I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Tell me all the ways you need me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
I'm not here for long[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Catch me or I go Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
I come and I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
 Prove you got the right to please me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
Everybody knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  Catch me or I go Houdini[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
               Houdini[/tab]

               Houdini[/tab]

               Houdini[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
               Catch me or I go Houdini[/tab]
